about.title: About Find-My-PG
about.subtitle: India's trusted platform to find paying guest accommodations across major cities.
about.missionDesc: Find-My-PG was built to solve a real problem — finding a safe, affordable PG in a new city is stressful. We bring together verified PG listings from owners and live data from Google Maps so that tenants can search, compare, and contact PG owners in minutes. Whether you are a student, a working professional, or someone relocating to a new city, Find-My-PG helps you find your home away from home.
about.step1Desc: Enter your city, area, or landmark. Filter by sharing type, budget, gender, and food.
about.step2Desc: View details, photos, and amenities. Call the owner directly or visit via Google Maps.
about.step3Desc: Visit the PG, finalize the deal, and move in. It's that simple.
about.offer1Desc: Owner-submitted PGs are reviewed and marked as verified for trust and safety.
about.offer2Desc: Real-time PG data from Google Maps with photos, ratings, and directions.
about.offer3Desc: Filter by Male, Female, or Co-living to find the right match.
about.offer4Desc: Bangalore, Mumbai, Delhi, Pune, Hyderabad, and Chennai — with more coming soon.
about.citiesDesc: Find PGs in India's biggest cities, with more being added regularly.
about.ctaTitle: Have a question or want to partner with us?
about.ctaDesc: We'd love to hear from you.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.infoCollectDesc:
When you use Find-My-PG, we may collect the following information:
- Search queries (city, area, filters) to show relevant PG listings
- Listing data submitted by PG owners (name, address, photos, contact details)
- Account information (email, phone number) when you sign up as a PG owner
- Device and browser information for analytics and improving our service
privacy.howWeUseDesc:
We use the collected information to:
- Display relevant PG search results based on your location and preferences
- Allow PG owners to manage their listings
- Process payments for verified and premium listing plans
- Improve our platform and user experience
- Send important updates about your account or listings
privacy.cookiesDesc: Find-My-PG uses cookies and similar technologies to remember your preferences, analyze site traffic, and improve performance. You can control cookie settings through your browser. We may use Google Analytics to understand how users interact with our platform.
privacy.thirdPartyDesc:
We use the following third-party services:
- Firebase (Google) — for authentication, database, and image storage
- Google Maps Platform — for PG location data, photos, and directions
- Stripe — for secure payment processing of listing upgrades

These services have their own privacy policies and we recommend reviewing them.
privacy.dataSecurityDesc: We take reasonable measures to protect your data. All data is stored securely on Firebase (Google Cloud) with encryption. Payment information is handled entirely by Stripe and never stored on our servers. However, no method of internet transmission is 100% secure.
privacy.userRightsDesc:
You have the right to:
- Access your personal data we hold
- Request correction of inaccurate data
- Request deletion of your account and associated data
- Opt out of marketing communications

To exercise these rights, contact us at findmypg@gmail.com.
privacy.changesDesc: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use of Find-My-PG after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.contactDesc: If you have questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your data, contact us at:

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question, feedback, or need help? We're here for you.
contact.hoursDesc:
Monday to Saturday
10:00 AM - 7:00 PM IST
contact.forTenantsDesc: Search thousands of verified PG listings across 6 major Indian cities. Use filters to find the perfect match for your budget and preferences.
contact.forOwnersDesc: List your PG for free and reach thousands of tenants. Add photos, amenities, and room configurations. Upgrade to Verified or Premium for better visibility.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceDesc: By accessing or using Find-My-PG (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Service.
terms.serviceDesc: Find-My-PG is a platform that connects paying guest (PG) seekers with PG owners across India. We aggregate listings from PG owners who submit their properties and from Google Maps data. Find-My-PG does not own, operate, or manage any PG accommodations listed on the platform.
terms.userResponsibilitiesDesc:
As a user of Find-My-PG, you agree to:
- Provide accurate and truthful information when creating listings
- Not post fraudulent, misleading, or spam listings
- Respect other users and PG owners
- Not use the platform for any illegal purpose
- Keep your account credentials secure
terms.listingGuidelinesDesc:
PG owners who list on Find-My-PG must:
- Provide accurate details about their property (address, rent, amenities, photos)
- Keep listing information up-to-date
- Respond to tenant enquiries in a timely manner
- Not discriminate based on caste, religion, or ethnicity

Find-My-PG reserves the right to remove any listing that violates these guidelines.
terms.paymentDesc:
Find-My-PG offers free and paid listing plans:
- Free: Basic listing visible in search results
- Verified: Verified badge and higher ranking (paid monthly)
- Premium: Gold badge, top ranking, and highlighted card (paid monthly)

Payments are processed securely through Stripe. All plan prices are displayed before purchase. Subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled.
terms.intellectualPropertyDesc: All content on Find-My-PG — including the name, logo, design, and code — is the intellectual property of Find-My-PG. User-submitted listing content (photos, descriptions) remains the property of the respective owners. By submitting a listing, you grant Find-My-PG a license to display your content on the platform.
terms.limitationDesc:
Find-My-PG is a listing platform and does not guarantee the accuracy of any listing information. We are not responsible for:
- The condition or quality of any PG accommodation
- Disputes between tenants and PG owners
- Loss or damage arising from the use of our platform
- Accuracy of third-party data (Google Maps listings)

Users should verify all details independently before making any decisions.
terms.terminationDesc: Find-My-PG may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms, post fraudulent listings, or engage in activity that harms other users or the platform. You may delete your account at any time by contacting us.
terms.changesDesc: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page. Continued use of Find-My-PG after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.questionsDesc: If you have questions about these terms, contact us at:
